title: retama monosperma subsp. bovei
intro: Retama monosperma subsp. bovei, also known as broom acacia or Spanish broom, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits also include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as a natural diuretic. Retama monosperma subsp. bovei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
